original_image_tags: A hole punch mark is visible on the left edge of the page, adjacent to the text "Ltr".
A hole punch mark is visible on the left edge of the page, lower down from the previous mark.

elements.description: A typed correspondence reference form (AFCAG-10) dated 6 February 1948, addressed to Commanding General, Air Materiel Command, Wright-Patterson Air Force Base, from Executive, Air Intelligence Requirements Div. The summary is 'Flying Discs.' There are two small, dark, circular punch holes on the left margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of two dark, circular hole punches on the left margin, which is the only visual element described.
